case_title: BLU J. MORRIS VS. CITIGROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORRIS, BLU J. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED JUL-19-2012 TO BLU J. MORRIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,188.00 FILED BY MORRIS, BLU J. AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP INC. DBA CITIBANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORRIS, BLU J. AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP INC. DBA CITIBANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, BLU J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITIGROUP INC. DBA CITIBANK THE CREDIT CARD DEBT OF $7,188 OWED TO CITIGROUP INC. BY BLU MORRIS IS DISCHARGED AND NO LONGER OWED TO CITIGROUP INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-14-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIGROUP INC. DBA CITIBANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF. FILED BY MORRIS, BLU J.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.
